articles.author: Ed Bott
articles.title: How to get free Windows 10 security patches until October 2027 - and avoid the $30 fee - ZDNET
articles.description: Don't want to pay to keep Windows 10 security updates? Microsoft has several workarounds, with the best deal for European users.
articles.content:
Kyle Kucharski/ZDNET Follow ZDNET: Add us as a preferred source on Google. ZDNET's key takeaways
  • Windows 10 PCs can receive free security updates until October 2027.
  • To qualify for… [+9671 chars]

articles.author: Charles Q. Choi
articles.title: Some of the last surviving Neanderthals were remarkably diverse — suggesting inbreeding didn't doom them - Live Science
articles.description: Some Neanderthals living in northwestern Europe after 52,500 years ago were surprisingly diverse, suggesting that they didn't all go extinct due to inbreeding.
